Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Aurelian Empire]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Being in charge of the Aurelian Empire makes one vulnerable to corruption.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Aurelian Empire uses a moon-in-sun symbol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder Marten is a loyal citizen of the Aurelian Empire.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — The Aurelian Empire contains a Capital where the Emperor lives in a palace that is one-fifth of the city's size.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The Am’haranai operate within the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Aurelian Empire is ruled by the Emperor.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — The Aurelian Empire's existence is tied to the Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Aurelian Empire contains various Guilds.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — There can be no Aurelian Empire without an Emperor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Aurelian Empire is the empire where Calder Marten serves as Imperial Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 18''' — The Emperor established the Aurelian Empire.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Calder was the second human being to sit on the throne of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — The Aurelian Empire was declared ended by the three Regents.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The Regents and the Guilds are both part of the Aurelian Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 12''' — The Aurelian Empire is the entity Trip refers to when speaking with an Imperial Guard.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
